experience.title: Industrial Automation Systems Integrator
experience.team: large structure by departments (Production, Maintenance, Quality, etc.)
responsibilities: Supervised production line pace and continuity.
Applied hotfixes to resolve incidents during production and avoid stoppages.

experience.notes: Entry-level role with strong operational learning; high-impact technical decisions are not emphasized. Differential value: adaptation in an international environment, operational English, and a fast learning curve.
